rule_text: Images must be housed in the brand Accent shape (§2.5) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops — not plain rectangles or circles. Waves and gradients may overlay photography.
intent: Maintain the signature asymmetric accent-shape framing for all photography.
summary: Images must use brand Accent shape (§2.5) with asymmetric rounded corners, no plain rectangles/circles; waves and gradients may overlay photos.
